channel.title: Polymythcal — Applications, calls, competitions, fellowships, and funding · Candidatures, appels, concours, bourses et financement
channel.description: Applications, calls, competitions, fellowships, and funding · Candidatures, appels, concours, bourses et financement — Polymythcal.

item.title: 2026 Lionel Gelber Prize Ceremony and Lecture
item.description: Munk School of Global Affairs, U of T (online), Online · confirmed · active

item.title: Frank Watson Book Prize Lecture: Patrons and Politics in the Making of Scottish History
item.description: University of Guelph History / Centre for Scottish Studies, Guelph · confirmed · active

item.title: JHI Writing Retreat (application deadline Apr 28)
item.description: Jackman Humanities Institute, 10th Floor, 170 St. George St, Unknown · confirmed · active

item.title: Sin Wai Kin: ESSENCE (CONTACT exhibition)
item.description: CONTACT Gallery, 80 Spadina Ave Suite 205, Toronto, Toronto · confirmed · active

item.title: CFP: Toronto Workshop on Moral Psychology and Moral Theory
item.description: Department of Philosophy, University of Toronto, JHB, 170 St George St, Toronto · unconfirmed · active

item.title: International Studies Association 2027 Convention
item.description: Special-program deadlines June and July, confirm the general call. International relations. Atlanta, March 2027, with a virtual option for Global South scholars., Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Journal of Humanistic Psychology, Authenticity in Lived-Experience Work
item.description: Abstract deadline, July 1. Special issue on authenticity in peer and lived-experience workforces. Sage. Journal special issue., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CFP: International Association for Philosophy of Time (Eastern APA 2027)
item.description: Submission deadline (conference: Boston, Jan 13–16 2027), Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CFP: University of Toronto Philosophy Graduate Conference 2026
item.description: Department of Philosophy, University of Toronto, JHB, 170 St George St, Toronto · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Write the World Monthly Competitions
item.description: Monthly competitions, a new genre each month, opening the first Monday. Poetry, fiction, journalism, screenwriting, and more. Open worldwide, ages 13 to 19. Free. Cash prizes and expert review., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: PAMLA 2026 Conference
item.description: Panel submission window, projected; confirm with the organizer. Literature and languages. Seattle, November 2026. Pacific Ancient and Modern Language Association. Confirm on the portal., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: The Aristotle Contest
item.description: Canada-wide high-school philosophy essay contest, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Foyle Young Poets of the Year Award 2026
item.description: Poetry submission deadline, 6 PM ET. Any theme, up to 40 lines. Open worldwide, ages 11 to 17. Free. AI-written poems barred., Unknown · confirmed · active

item.title: OSA Toronto Panorama (steelpan competition)
item.description: Lamport Stadium, Toronto · confirmed · active

item.title: Polar Expressions Summer Writing Contest 2026
item.description: Submission deadline. Poetry up to 48 lines or a short story up to 750 words. Open to Canadian residents of all ages, with a division for ages 15 and under. Free., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: R.A. Butler Prize in Politics and International Studies
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the annual July window. Politics or international studies essay, up to 3000 words. Penultimate-year students worldwide. Free. Trinity College, Cambridge. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: The Concord Review
item.description: Rolling deadlines, next August 1 for the Winter issue. History research essay, roughly 4000 to 21000 words. Secondary students worldwide, sole author. Seventy US dollar submission fee. Publishes about five percent., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Trinity College Cambridge Subject Essay Prizes
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the summer window. Subject essays in English, law, history, philosophy, and more, around 2000 to 2500 words. Year 12 and 13 students worldwide. Free. Some prizes skip a year, confirm each on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Archaeological Institute of America 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Second deadline, August 3, workshops, open papers, and posters, with roundtables to November 1. Boston, January 2027., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: New York Times Summer Reading Contest
item.description: Submission window, June 5 to August 14, open now. Respond to anything in the Times that drew you in. Open worldwide, ages 13 to 19, middle and high school. Free. Part of the recurring Learning Network contest calendar., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Association of American Law Schools 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Section calls vary, projected; confirm with the organizer. Legal education, theme Emancipate Academic Freedom. New York, January 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Renaissance Society of America, Philadelphia 2027
item.description: Submission deadline, August 15. Renaissance and early-modern sessions and papers. RSA members, sessions need a degree-holding presenter. Philadelphia, March 2027., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Marshall Society Essay Competition in Economics
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the late-August window. Economics essay on a set question, about 1500 words. Pre-university students worldwide. Free. University of Cambridge. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: International Medieval Congress, Leeds 2027, Communities
item.description: Paper deadline, August 31, sessions September 30. Medieval studies, theme Communities. University of Leeds, July 2027, hybrid., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Metaphysical Society of America 2027 Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline, September 1. Metaphysics abstracts and full papers, theme Habits of Being. Open, with student and early-career prizes. Gonzaga University, March 2027., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Harvard Radcliffe Fellowship application deadline, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Invention to Impact Training Program Fall 2026 Application Deadline
item.description: McGill University, Montréal, Montréal · unconfirmed · active

item.title: EHESS, Exploring Plantation Records
item.description: Submission deadline is listed as September 15; confirm the year. History of slavery, French Caribbean. EHESS, Paris, June 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: International Congress on Medieval Studies, Kalamazoo 62nd
item.description: Submission deadline, September 15. Medieval studies, interdisciplinary. Open, graduate students welcome. Western Michigan University, May 2027, hybrid., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: College Art Association 115th, Call for Participation
item.description: Participation window, chairs select by about September 16. Art history and visual studies. CAA members. New York, February 2027. Session proposals already closed., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: MLA 2027 Convention, just-in-time sessions
item.description: Just-in-time session window, open through about September 18. Literature and languages. MLA members. Los Angeles, January 2027. Most regular sessions already closed., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: ACLS Fellowship competition, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: ACLA Annual Meeting seminar proposal deadline, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Elizabeth Bowen Review, Volume 8
item.description: Submission deadline, September 30. Essays up to 6000 words, Why Bowen Matters. Irish and modernist literary studies. Journal, double-blind review., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Hamilton Public Library Power of the Pen
item.description: Hamilton regional contest, ages 12 to 18, Hamilton · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Institute for Human Sciences Vienna fellowships, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Journal of the Georgia Philological Association
item.description: Submission deadline, September 30. Literature, language, philology, interdisciplinary humanities. Journal., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Verge, Studies in Global Asias 14.2
item.description: Proposal deadline, September 30, essays May 2027. Special issue, The Cultural Labor of Internationalism. Global Asias scholarship. Penn State. Journal special issue., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: AAR Southeast Region 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline, October 1, undergraduate award papers December 15. Religious studies. Virginia Commonwealth University, March 2027., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Getty Scholar Grants, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: SAAS 18th Conference, Negotiating Identity and Power
item.description: Panel and paper deadline projected; confirm with the organizer. American studies and literature. Universidad de Oviedo, March 2027. Spanish Association for American Studies. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: National Humanities Center Fellowship deadline, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: YoungArts National Arts Competition
item.description: Not eligible for most Toronto students, US citizens, residents, or those able to receive US taxable income only. Submission deadline projected from the October window. Writing categories, ages 15 to 18. Thirty-five dollar fee with waivers., Toronto · unconfirmed · active

item.title: HASTAC opportunities and CFP scan, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Hermann Weber Conference 9th, Communist Regimes and the World Economy
item.description: Submission deadline projected; confirm with the organizer. History, communist regimes and the world economy since the 1970s. University of Regensburg, April 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Institute for Advanced Study fellowship applications, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: COC Centre Stage: Ensemble Studio Competition & Gala
item.description: Four Seasons Centre for the Performing Arts, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: ACLS Dissertation Innovation Fellowship, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CFP: Athens Institute 22nd International Conference on Philosophy
item.description: Submission deadline (conference: Athens, May 24–29 2027), Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Law and Society Association 2027 International Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected, the call opens about summer. Socio-legal studies. University of Hong Kong, June 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Academy in Rome Rome Prize, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Dumbarton Oaks fellowships and awards, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Royal Canadian Legion Literary Contest
item.description: Canada-wide via local Legion branches, grades 4 to 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Bennington Young Writers Awards
item.description: Submission deadline, opens September 1. Poetry, fiction, or nonfiction. Open worldwide, grades 9 to 12, with a teacher sponsor. Free. Prizes to two thousand dollars plus Bennington scholarships., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CBC Literary Prizes
item.description: Eligibility note, entrants must have reached the age of majority, 18 in Ontario, so most high schoolers wait. Next is the Short Story Prize, opening September, about a November deadline. Twenty-five dollar fee. Canadian residents. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Digital Humanities 2027, Creativity
item.description: Submission deadline projected; confirm with the organizer; the call is expected late 2026. Digital humanities, theme Creativity. University of Galway, June and July 2027. Alliance of Digital Humanities Organizations., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: International Conference on Medical Humanities
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual late-year window; confirm with the organizer. Medical humanities, interdisciplinary. Online. Confirm on the site., Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Society for Global Nineteenth-Century Studies 2027 World Congress
item.description: Submission deadline projected; confirm with the organizer. Global nineteenth-century studies. Valparaiso, Chile, July 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CASBS fellowship applications, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Huntington Library fellowships, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Princeton UCHV visiting faculty and fellowship opportunities, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: OSSTF Student Achievement Awards
item.description: Ontario public secondary schools, grades 9 to 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Polar Expressions Student Writing Contest 2026
item.description: Submission deadline. Poetry up to 32 lines or a short story up to 450 words. Canadian students, kindergarten to grade 12. Free., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Association for Law, Property, and Society 2027 Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from a late-November window; confirm with the organizer. Property law, interdisciplinary. Cardiff University, 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Patricia Grodd Poetry Prize for Young Writers
item.description: Poetry submission window, November 1 to 30. One unpublished poem. Open internationally, grades 10 and 11. Free. Winner publishes in The Kenyon Review and earns a Young Writers workshop scholarship., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: SHARP annual conference CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Society for Applied Philosophy annual conference CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Warburg Institute fellowships, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CHCI annual meeting proposals, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Scholastic Art and Writing Awards
item.description: Regional deadlines, projected across the December to January window. Eleven writing categories. Students in the US and Canada, grades 7 to 12, age 13 and over. Ten dollar per entry with waivers. Final work cannot be AI-generated. Confirm your region on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: French for the Future National Essay Contest
item.description: Canada-wide French essay scholarship contest, grades 10 to 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Journal of Marlowe Studies 2027 Issue
item.description: Submission window, projected; confirm with the organizer. Early-modern literary studies. Sheffield Hallam University. Journal., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: The Space Between, Literature and Culture 1914 to 1945
item.description: Rolling submissions for the 2027 and 2028 issues. Interwar literary and cultural studies. Journal., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Canadian Philosophical Association Congress
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual January window. Papers and symposia across philosophy. CPA members, held with the Congress of the Humanities. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Midwest AAR 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual January window. Religious studies, membership not required to submit. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: British Society for Ethical Theory annual conference CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Political Science Association 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual January window. Political science. APSA. Annual meeting. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Ethnological Society Spring 2027 Conference
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual January window. Cultural anthropology. American Ethnological Society. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: European Society for Aesthetics annual conference CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Folger Shakespeare Library fellowships, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Society for History in the Federal Government 2027 Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual January window. Public and federal history. Washington area. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Society for Phenomenology and Existential Philosophy 64th Conference
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual January window. Continental philosophy papers, panels, and book sessions. Members worldwide. Loyola University Chicago. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: British Society for the History of Philosophy annual conference CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: ICMA-sponsored session, CAA 2028
item.description: Session deadline projected from the annual February window. Medieval art history. International Center of Medieval Art. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: North American Society for Social Philosophy conference CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Philosophy of Management 18th Annual Conference
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual February window. Philosophy of management and organization. EM Normandie, Paris. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: SBL International Meeting 2027
item.description: Submission deadline projected; confirm with the organizer. Biblical studies and religion. Leuven, Belgium, July 2027. Society of Biblical Literature. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: OECTA Young Authors Awards
item.description: Ontario Catholic-school pathway, JK to grade 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: ASOR annual meeting abstract deadline, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Historical Association 2028 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual mid-February window. History, all fields. AHA members. Annual meeting. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: European Society for Analytic Philosophy congress CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Poetry In Voice Write Contest
item.description: Submission window, projected August 15 to February 15, monthly winners. Poetry. Canadian students, grades 7 to 12, under 19. Free. FutureVerse intensive for senior winners. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Meaning of Home Student Contest
item.description: Canada-wide online, grades 4 to 6, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Sociological Association 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Main paper deadline projected, the call opens about November. Sociology, theme Realizing the Promise of Sociology. Chicago, August 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Amazon Canada First Novel Award Youth Short Story
item.description: Deadline approximate, projected from the winter window; confirm with the organizer. Short story. Canadian teens, ages 13 to 17. Free. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CBC First Page Student Writing Challenge
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the annual February window. One opening page of a novel set 150 years ahead, 300 to 400 words. Canadian residents, grades 7 to 12. Free. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Ottawa Public Library Awesome Authors Youth Writing Contest
item.description: Ottawa regional contest, ages 9 to 18, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: River of Words Poetry and Art Contest
item.description: Deadline approximate, projected from the late-February window; confirm with the organizer. Poetry and art on a watershed theme. Students worldwide, kindergarten to grade 12. Free. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Academy of Religion 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual March window. Religious studies and theology. AAR members. Washington, November 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Society for Bioethics and Humanities 2027 Conference
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual March window. Bioethics and health humanities. Columbus, October 2027. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Canadian Nuclear Society Essay Contest
item.description: Canada-wide STEM communication essay contest, grades 9 to 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: NIAS fellowships, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Toronto Public Library Young Voices Magazine
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the annual March window. Poems, stories, reviews, comics. Teens who live, work, or study in Toronto, ages 12 to 19. Free. Strict AI ban. Publication, no cash prize. Confirm on the site., Toronto · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Kids Write 4 Kids
item.description: Canada-wide online, grades 4 to 8, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: YABS Young Writers Award
item.description: Alberta province-wide, grades 4 to 9, Online · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Indigenous Arts and Stories
item.description: Program appears on hiatus, confirm with the organizer before relying on it. Historically a March 31 deadline. Creative writing and art. Canadians of Indigenous ancestry, ages 6 to 29. Free., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Princeton Ten-Minute Play Contest
item.description: Deadline projected from the annual March window, or once 250 entries fill. One ten-minute play, up to ten pages. Eleventh-grade students or the international equivalent. Free. Princeton University. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Vancouver Writers Fest Youth Writing Contest
item.description: British Columbia province-wide, grades 5 to 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Society for Classical Studies 2028 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual April window. Classics. SCS members. Annual meeting with the Archaeological Institute. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Italian Art Society session, CAA 2028
item.description: Session deadline projected from the annual April window. Italian art history. Italian Art Society at the CAA conference. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Stephen Leacock Student Humorous Writing Competition
item.description: Postmark deadline, projected from the annual April window. Humorous short story or essay, about 1500 words, mailed. Ontario students, ages 14 to 19. Five dollar fee. Fifteen hundred dollar first prize. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: International Virginia Woolf Conference 36th
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual spring window. Modernist literary studies. Annual conference, location rotates. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Jessamy Stursberg Poetry Prize for Canadian Youth
item.description: Canada-wide poetry prize, grades 7 to 12, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Queen's Commonwealth Writing Competition
item.description: International Commonwealth contest, Canadians eligible, 18 and under, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: The Adroit Prizes for Poetry and Prose
item.description: Submission window, projected from the annual April to May cycle. Up to five poems or three prose works. Secondary and undergraduate students worldwide. Fifteen US dollar fee with waivers. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: American Anthropological Association 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual spring window. Anthropology, unified single call. AAA. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: AIES 2027, AI Ethics and Society
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual spring window; confirm with the organizer. AI ethics, interdisciplinary. AAAI and ACM conference. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Paris Conference on AI and Digital Ethics 2027
item.description: Submission deadline projected from the annual spring window; confirm with the organizer. AI ethics, interdisciplinary, with a journal track. Paris. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: CNIB Braille Creative Writing Contest
item.description: Canada-wide, K to grade 12, braille submissions, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: James Bartleman Indigenous Youth Creative Writing Award
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the annual May window. Any creative writing. Indigenous students enrolled in and resident in Ontario, under 18. Free. Twenty-five hundred dollars to up to six recipients. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: John Locke Institute Global Essay Prize 2027
item.description: Essay submission deadline, approximate. Annual prize across ten subjects, registration opens about February, 2026 deadline was May 31. Open worldwide, under 19. Free. Confirm the date on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Fraser Institute Student Essay Contest
item.description: Canada-wide and Canadian students abroad, high school division, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Diverse Minds Manitoba
item.description: Manitoba high-school illustrated children's book contest, Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: USC Cinema and Media Studies Graduate Conference, Delirium
item.description: Deadline projected for the next annual cycle; confirm with the organizer. Media studies, graduate. University of Southern California. Graduate conference. Confirm on the site., Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Philosophy of Science Association biennial meeting CFP, projected
item.description: Global / online submission deadline, Online · unconfirmed · active
